channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ukraine and Saudi Arabia agree on cooperation to strengthen air defence systems
item.description: Ukraine and Saudi Arabia have entered into a new air defence cooperation agreement during President Volodymyr Zelensky’s visit to the kingdom. The accord follows a series of Iranian drone attacks on S...

item.title: Foreign Governments and Rights Groups Condemn Prison Term for Georgian Opposition Leader Elene Khoshtaria
item.description: International and diplomatic actors have strongly condemned the recent prison sentence handed down to Georgian opposition politician Elene Khoshtaria, describing it as politically motivated and dispro...

item.title: Albanese defends Australia’s actions amid Trump’s criticism over Iran conflict
item.description: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has responded to former US President Donald Trump’s criticism regarding Australia’s support in the Iran war. Trump expressed surprise at Australia’s stance, ...

item.title: China supports Pakistan-led mediation to help resume safe transit through Strait of Hormuz amid US-Iran tensions
item.description: China has expressed support for Pakistan's role as a mediator between the United States and Iran, highlighting the importance of restoring safe navigation through the Strait of Hormuz. During a call b...

item.title: China Denies Report Linking SMIC to Iran Chip Supply
item.description: China on Friday strongly denied recent media reports claiming that its leading semiconductor firm, SMIC, had been sending chipmaking equipment to Iran for over a year. The report, citing unnamed US of...

item.title: US Treasury to Feature President Trump’s Signature on Redesigned Notes for 250th Anniversary
item.description: For the first time in American history, US currency will carry the signature of a sitting president. The Treasury Department announced that notes featuring President Donald Trump’s signature will begi...

item.title: Iranians describe hardships and uncertainty after a month of US-Israel conflict
item.description: After one month of the US-Israel war on Iran, ordinary Iranians are struggling to adapt to a life overshadowed by bombings, economic collapse, and fear. With much of the economy paralysed, inflation s...

item.title: Philippine peso weakens to record low amid Middle East conflict concerns
item.description: The Philippine peso fell to an all-time low of ₱60.55 against the US dollar by the end of a turbulent trading week, driven largely by ongoing concerns over the escalating conflict in the Middle East. ...

item.title: Toronto Blue Jays mark 50 years with renewed World Series ambitions
item.description: The Toronto Blue Jays begin their 50th season in Major League Baseball with high hopes following a near miss in the 2025 World Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers. Since debuting on a snowy April d...

item.title: Local Holiday in Lahore District on 28th March for Mela Chiraghan
item.description: LAHORE: The Punjab government has officially declared a local holiday in Lahore on 28th March 2026 to observe the annual Mela Chiraghan festival, which commemorates the Urs of the revered Sufi saint S...

item.title: Woman found guilty of £23,000 benefit fraud after investigators uncover holiday activities in Mexico
item.description: Catherine Wieland, a 33-year-old woman from Goring-by-Sea in West Sussex, was convicted of benefit fraud after falsely claiming more than £23,000 in Personal Independence Payments (PIP). She told the ...

item.title: Parliament Proceedings Update: Rajya Sabha Adjourned, Lok Sabha Debates Key Bills and Public Issues
item.description: On March 27, 2026, the Indian Parliament continued its Budget Session with both Houses actively engaged in legislative discussions. The Lok Sabha focused on Matters of Public Importance and passed sig...

item.title: Palace defends Philippines' declaration of state of national energy emergency amid Middle East crisis
item.description: Malacañang emphasized the swift action of the Marcos administration after the Philippines declared a state of national energy emergency on March 24, 2026, through Executive Order 110. Palace Press Off...

item.title: South Africa Faces Severe Fuel Price Shock and Economic Strain
item.description: South Africa is experiencing an unprecedented fuel price surge, with petrol, diesel, and paraffin costs rising sharply. Petrol 93 increased by R5.50 per litre, Petrol 95 by R6.00, diesel by over R10 p...

item.title: France denies U.S. influence in G7 decision as Kenya replaces South Africa at summit
item.description: French officials have rejected claims from President Cyril Ramaphosa's office that South Africa was excluded from the upcoming G7 summit in Paris due to pressure from Washington. The French foreign mi...

item.title: Super Eagles set for friendly showdown with Iran in Turkey
item.description: The Super Eagles of Nigeria go face Iran in one international friendly match for Antalya, Turkey, as part of a four-nation invitational wey include Jordan and Costa Rica. This friendly match go help b...

item.title: Revolution | London and EXACT Technology Launch Integrated xBOLT Sensor for Real-Time Concrete Temperature Monitoring
item.description: Revolution | London has launched xBOLT™ for INSIGHT™, a new in-drum temperature monitoring system designed to provide real-time visibility of concrete temperature during transport. Developed in collab...

item.title: Pakistani worker killed in Abu Dhabi missile debris laid to rest in Bannu after repatriation
item.description: The body of Safir Ullah Eid Marjan, a Pakistani driver from Khyber Pakhtunkhwa who lost his life after being struck by missile debris in Abu Dhabi, has been returned to Islamabad for burial. The Pakis...

item.title: Three-year-old girl found safe after Seaview kidnapping incident in Karachi
item.description: Karachi Police have successfully recovered a three-year-old girl named Warisha who had gone missing from Seaview Beach on the third day of Eid ul Fitr. The incident occurred when the child was playing...

item.title: New Project Launched to Restore Ruvu Basin and Improve Water Security
item.description: Dar es Salaam and nearby areas are getting a major boost in water security through a new $1.94 million project focused on the Ruvu sub-basin. Known as the Nature-based Solutions for Catchment Restorat...
